title: Property Consultant - RERA Authorities - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - RERA Authorities - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
RERA Authorities, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About RERA Authorities:
RERA Authorities is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RERA Authorities!
